title: CHILDBIRTH EDUCATION - 211info
text: YOUR BIRTH YOUR WAY CHILDBIRTH EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prenatal education and support, childbirth education classes, newborn care classes, and doula services. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 798-3643 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 798-3643 Main phone Main phone (503) 798-3643 Heidi Donahue Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to email for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and most insurance. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Marion Counties Services: Childbirth Education Doula Services Parenting Skills Classes Pregnant/Parenting Inmate Support Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUR BIRTH YOUR WAY
